introSection: Wild Mouse is a steel roller coaster currently owned & travelled by Australian carnival operator Joylands.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The roller coaster opened on May 5, 2018 at Funland at The Tropicana in Weston-super-Mare, Somerset, England, UK. It was purchased new from Italian manufacturer SBF Visa Group.

fullText:
Wild Mouse is a steel roller coaster currently owned & travelled by Australian carnival operator Joylands.

The roller coaster opened on May 5, 2018 at Funland at The Tropicana in Weston-super-Mare, Somerset, England, UK. It was purchased new from Italian manufacturer SBF Visa Group.

Standard Z40 layout.
